var.comment: Initialize result accumulator with constant value 0 before repeat starts
var.name: result

repeat.comment: Iterate over variation values and accumulate their sum into result

var.comment: Add current variation value {{a}} to accumulated result
var.name: result

condition.comment: Verify final result equals the expected sum of all variation values
condition.name: resultIsExpectedSum

assert.comment: Verify that result equals the sum of all variation values after repeat completes

notEqual.comment: result should not equal an incorrect sum of 7
